spec_match.rationale: chrome-devtools-mcp verified the real DOM probe opens popover=auto first and then popover=hint; Chrome Canary 151 kept both elements :popover-open, matching the Chrome 150 coexistence contract.

interactive.rationale: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp: focused File, pressed Enter to open the auto menu, focused Save to show the hint while the menu stayed open, then pressed Escape to close the menu and reset aria-expanded.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent keyboard accessibility concept description.

edge_cases.rationale: The support state distinguishes basic Popover API support, hint value reflection, real auto-then-hint coexistence, Escape handling, and aria-expanded state.

references.rationale: Properly references the official ChromeStatus feature page.

design_system.rationale: Superb formatting using clear outlines, color-coded badges, and neat checklist grid items.

summary: chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 with Chrome Canary 151.0.0.0 verified the keyboard path: File opens with Enter, Save focus opens hint while File remains open, Escape closes the menu, console is clean, ChromeStatus is linked, and the feature conformance route reports 6 PASS / 0 FAIL.
